sequences.sequence_name:
{
  "sequence_name": "Free Trial Onboarding",
  "trigger": "New free trial user signs up",
  "emails": [
    {
      "day": 0,
      "subject_line": "Welcome to Acme SaaS! Let's save you time.",
      "preview_text": "Your free trial starts now. Here's how to get your first win in minutes.",
      "body": "Hey there!

Welcome to Acme SaaS! We're thrilled to have you on board. Our mission is simple: help small business owners like you automate operations, save a ton of time, and grow without the headaches of manual work.

Ready to see how easy it is to get started?

**Your Quick Win Today:**

1.  **Log in:** Head over to your dashboard: [Login Link]
2.  **Connect an app:** Link your favorite app (like [Example App 1] or [Example App 2]) to Acme Automate.
3.  **Create your first simple workflow:** We've got templates to make it super fast. Try automating a simple task, like getting a notification when a new lead comes in.

We're confident Acme SaaS will help you save at least 10 hours a week, guaranteed. Let's start building your smarter business today!

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Log In & Get Started"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "subject_line": "Feature Spotlight: Say goodbye to manual data entry!",
      "preview_text": "Discover how Acme Automate's smart connectors can save you hours every week.",
      "body": "Hi,

Two days in, and we hope you're already feeling the power of automation! Today, we want to spotlight one of our most loved features: **Smart Connectors**.

Imagine never having to manually transfer data between your apps again. Our Smart Connectors seamlessly link your CRM, email, project management tools, and more, ensuring your data is always where it needs to be, automatically.

**How Smart Connectors help you:**
*   **Eliminate errors:** No more typos or missed entries.
*   **Save countless hours:** Automate routine data transfers.
*   **Boost team productivity:** Free up your team for more important tasks.

This is enterprise power, at a small business price. Ready to see it in action?

Check out our guide on setting up your first Smart Connector here: [Feature Guide Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Explore Smart Connectors"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "subject_line": "Don't just take our word for it... See how [Customer Name] saved 15 hours/week!",
      "preview_text": "Real results from a small business owner just like you.",
      "body": "Hey there,

We talk a lot about saving time and growing your business with automation, but don't just take *our* word for it. Meet [Customer Name], owner of [Customer Business Type] at [Customer Company Name].

Before Acme SaaS, [Customer Name] was swamped with manual tasks, spending nearly two full days a week on repetitive admin. After implementing Acme Automate, they were able to:

*   **Automate client onboarding by 80%**
*   **Reduce manual data entry by 90%**
*   **Save an incredible 15 hours every single week!**

"Acme SaaS has been a game-changer," says [Customer Name]. "It's like having an extra team member without the extra cost. My team of one just got a lot bigger!"

Ready to write your own success story? There's still plenty of time left in your free trial to see how much you can achieve.

Read [Customer Name]'s full story: [Testimonial Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Start Your Own Success Story"
    },
    {
      "day": 8,
      "subject_line": "Too busy to automate? Think again. We make it easy.",
      "preview_text": "Worried about setup? Our intuitive interface and stellar support have you covered.",
      "body": "Hi,

As a small business owner, we know your time is precious. Maybe you've thought about automation but worried it would be too complex, too time-consuming to set up, or just another tool to learn.

We hear you! That's why Acme SaaS is designed differently:

*   **Simplest Setup:** Our drag-and-drop interface and pre-built templates mean you can create workflows in minutes, not hours.
*   **Best Support:** Stuck? Our friendly, expert support team is always ready to help you every step of the way.
*   **No Coding Required:** Seriously. You don't need to be a tech expert to automate like one.

Our edge is making powerful automation accessible to everyone. Don't let perceived complexity stop you from saving hours every week.

Still have questions? Let's chat! We'd love to show you just how easy it is.

Talk to a specialist: [Support Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Get Your Questions Answered"
    },
    {
      "day": 12,
      "subject_line": "Your free trial is ending soon! Don't lose your progress.",
      "preview_text": "Unlock full power, keep your automations running, and save even more time.",
      "body": "Hey,

It's been great having you with us on the free trial! We hope you've already experienced the magic of automation and seen how Acme SaaS can transform your business.

Your free trial is wrapping up soon. To ensure you keep all your amazing automations running, continue saving those precious hours, and unlock even more powerful features, it's time to choose a plan that's right for you.

**Why Upgrade?**
*   **Keep your workflows:** Seamless transition, no re-setup needed.
*   **Unlock advanced features:** More integrations, higher usage limits, priority support.
*   **Continue saving time and money:** Our plans are designed to pay for themselves many times over.

Remember, we guarantee you'll save 10 hours a week. Invest in your business's efficiency today.

Choose your plan and continue your journey to a smarter business!

See Pricing & Upgrade Now: [Pricing Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Upgrade Now"
    }
  ]
}
